head: be3cd8b 2026-07-14 17:41:56 +0200
branches_note: origin/HEAD/default is 'dev' (be3cd8b's parent line); audited origin/main because main is a strict SUPERSET of dev (main = dev + PR#33 deploy-parity fix 9664094 + merge commits; dev 0-ahead). No dev branch is ahead of main for source purposes — the only main-over-dev delta is deploy YAML, not story code. crew/daniel is 21 behind dev (stale). No ENG-2069 nothing-on-main hazard here: main leads. fetch origin succeeded.

E1-S1.note: Server core complete: both transports + connect-time instructions + authoring-guide resource.

E1-S2.note: Hero-only default surface + list_tools progressive disclosure implemented.

E1-S3.note: whoami is a single-round-trip live capability probe; test coverage is via enforcement + e2e (no dedicated unit).

E1-S4.note: DfM-only enforced by construction (no raw-markdown input) + opaque-node handle guard.

E2-S2.note: CAS + read-after-write receipt + 402 QUOTA verbatim all present.

E2-S3.note: get_changes list+block pull modes on caller's scoped token; admin firehose removed.

E2-S4.note: Both navigation tools registered and implemented.

E3-S2.note: Typed client generated from contracts descriptor; note /v1 verbs still return 501 sentinels upstream.

E3-S3.note: resolveAsk routing + strict K5 passthrough, no synthesized fallback.

E3-S4.note: search/related/neighborhood exist but reach knowledge THROUGH wiki-api, not direct — arch §A-UPSTREAM holds no knowledge base URL, so the 'direct (D-M8)' routing is deliberately not implemented.

E4-S1.note: Multi-issuer JWKS + aud/frozen-claim + deny-by-default scope gate → Principal.

E4-S2.note: Introspection client + FR-C13 conformance vector suite wired as CI release gate.

E4-S3.note: Caller token forwarded verbatim on every upstream; no service credential minted.

E4-S4.note: Governance modes are transport-only; never self-mint; RATIFY/CONFIRM forwarded verbatim.

E4-S5.note: stdio verify-once parity + static-only resource standing gate.

E5-S1.note: No DB deps; in-memory principal-independent caches; jti window retired at R1.

E5-S2.note: In-process kafkajs revocation consumer applies to deny-list (evict-before-serve, idempotent, DLQ).

E5-S3.note: Cell contract: /healthz echoes CELL_ID+CLUSTER_NAME, orvexcell fail-closed, cell-scoped topic, discovery routing.

E6-S1.note: Eight studio_* tools (≥6) with caller-token pass-through + fail-closed scope gate.

E6-S2.note: Tools exist but call STUDIO_BACKEND, not knowledge — the Decision-4/C21 re-home onto orvex-studio-knowledge is not implemented.

E6-S3.note: memory tools exist but hit Studio /api/memory/formspec, not a knowledge tool call (AD-5b/I-4 not implemented).

E7-S1.note: Golden-tape KPI harness with committed fixtures + CI release gate.

E7-S2.note: health/healthz + shim-overhead SLI gate present, but NO OTel/Prometheus metric export to LGTM.

E7-S3.note: AGPL import-grep gate in CI + typed-degradation (never fail open).

E7-S4.note: MCP-side FR-C5 parity ledger (73/73 dispositioned) + gate; the physical package deletion lives in the engine repo.

summary: 27 stories: 23 present, 4 partial, 0 absent. The MCP protocol surface (E1), wiki verb shim (E2), upstream repoint + ask→ai codegen (E3-S1..S3), auth edge (E4), statelessness/revocation/cell contract (E5), studio product tools (E6-S1) and golden-tape/AGPL/parity-ledger gates (E7-S1/S3/S4) are all implemented with meaningful hermetic tests. The 4 partials are all the same shape — a deliberate arch divergence, not rot: knowledge is reached THROUGH wiki-api/ai (never MCP-direct, §A-UPSTREAM), so E3-S4's 'search/related→knowledge direct', E6-S2's 'marketplace/skill re-home onto knowledge', and E6-S3's 'memory as a knowledge tool call' are unimplemented (tools exist but on wiki-api/studio-backend); E7-S2 has health/healthz + a shim-overhead SLI CI gate but no OTel/Prometheus export to LGTM.
